discussion_posts.name: TGBBSZWHWDLANZP
discussion_posts.content:
you can use `zip_longest` to handle cols with fewer characters, e.g. `crm` and `dt` in example 2

There is a keyword arg `zip_longest(*iterables, fillvalue=None)`, where you can pass an empty string, so that `''.join()` doesn't crash on `None`'s.

https://devdocs.io/python~3.9/library/itertools#itertools.zip_longest
